title: PCG Seed Generation Record
description: Records the parameters and outcome of a procedural content generation seed.

seedId.description: Unique identifier for this generated seed and master join key for world state.

generationRequestId.description: Identifier for the request that triggered seed generation.

generatorVersion.description: Version identifier for the PCG algorithm used.

sessionId.description: Session identifier for the runtime or meta-session this seed is associated with.

regionId.description: Optional region identifier if the seed is scoped to a specific region.

initialRegionId.description: Identifier of the first region the player spawns in for this seed.

descriptorId.description: Generic descriptor join key linking this seed to higher-level descriptors.

sessionMetricsEnvelopeId.description: Optional join key linking this seed record to a session metrics envelope.

parameters.description: Input parameters for the PCG algorithm.

worldStyle.description: Aesthetic or thematic style label for the world, such as Lovecraftian or Slasher.

difficultyLevel.description: Initial difficulty setting label such as Normal or Nightmare.

seedValue.description: Integer seed value produced by the PCG algorithm.

metadata.description: Optional statistics or derived properties for the generated seed, such as layout complexity.
